Video.summary: Albert Brooks and Susan Sarandon head to the couch to talk about everything from love to clam shucking.
Video.title: The Best Of Carnac (4/9/81)

Image.alt: The Best Of Carnac (4/9/81)
The Best Of Carnac (4/9/81)
The Best Of Carnac (4/9/81)

Video.summary: George Carlin sticks only to words you CAN say on TV. Plus, Rita Reutter, McLean Stevenson, and more.
Video.title: Comic Legends Of The '70s - George Carlin (2/15/77)

Image.alt: Comic Legends Of The '70s - George Carlin (2/15/77)
Comic Legends Of The '70s - George Carlin (2/15/77)
Comic Legends Of The '70s - George Carlin (2/15/77)

Video.summary: If you’ve ever wondered what an aardvark looks like, this episode is for you. Also features David Steinberg.
Video.title: Animal Antics With Jim Fowler (6/18/81)

Image.alt: Animal Antics With Jim Fowler (6/18/81)
Animal Antics With Jim Fowler (6/18/81)

Video.summary: Stars of two of the televisions biggest shows join Johnny--Ted Danson (Cheers) and Courtney Cox (Friends).
Video.title: Hollywood Icons Of The '90s - Courtney Cox (9/19/85)

Image.alt: Hollywood Icons Of The '90s - Courtney Cox (9/19/85)
Hollywood Icons Of The '90s - Courtney Cox (9/19/85)

Video.summary: Chevy Chase promotes National Lampoon’s Vacation and brings a tennis racquet on stage to show off his serve.

Video.summary: Walter Matthau disguises an eye problem, jokes about his roommate in the hospital and the awful food.

Video.summary: Sean Connery gives a Bond trivia quiz and recalls his scariest stunts. Keenan Ivory Wayans also appears.

Video.summary: Carl makes his 46th visit to the couch. Discusses dieting, presents gifts: slippers, pipe, glasses and….a gun.
